name: 12" Aluminum Ceramic Grill Pan Dark Gray - Figmint™: Nonstick, Dishwasher & Oven-Safe, Gas & Electric Compatible
description:
Enjoy a superior grilling experience with this Aluminum Ceramic Grill Pan from Figmint™. The nonstick aluminum grill pan is easy to clean and lets you cook with less oil, and it features a long handle to transport dishes from stovetop to tabletop with ease and safety. Compatible with gas, electric and induction stoves, the grill pan is also oven safe up to 500°F, and it's dishwasher safe for easy cleaning.

Figmint™: Mixing up a taste of adventure every day.
